name: Ed Barlow
tagline: Software engineer, database architect, and published author. Building thoughtful systems for complex problems.
home_html:
AI Enabled Senior Principal Engineer looking for AI Enablement Roles

My Reworked Process Based Methodology and scale-proven Technology Rules combine into a Specification Driven Framework

This lets you seamlessly build interoperable programs you can manage in a command center.

This lets you tell an AI to define a specification (explicitly stating 'no technical details' other than the stack choice), and it will transform into a supportable conformed application providing you many benefits.

  • Control Panel - Lets you control all your projects visualized in namespaces
  • Service Catalog - Automated Proxy Enables Seamless Interoperability
  • Opinionated Stack - Context Optimized Stack Definition for consistent builds
  • Formal Workflow - For Updating your Application via Tickets/Specifications to ensure quality
  • Seamless Operations - Monitoring, Documentation, Scheduled tasks, and Data Flows
  • Self Iteration Workflow - Magically update your code with new features (you just ask it to)
  • Scorecards, Validators, and a Code Build Process ensure quality
  • Voice Control of your program fleet (in progress)

Who I Am

Principal Engineer/Director at hedge funds, investment banks, insurance companies, and startups

Author, Speaker, Free Software Developer
